CustomField.description: Represents the amount of time it takes to fulfill an order after it is placed
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Packaged_Date__c), NULL, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Delay_Ship_Date_To__c)), Packaged_Date__c - Delay_Ship_Date_To__c, Packaged_Date__c - CreatedDate))
CustomField.label: Order Fulfillment Time (Days)
